cnc-host.description: host name or ip address of the target CNC Cluster

cnc-port.description: port number of the target CNC Cluster

post.description: Undeploys the specified package by removing it and running the 2 phase commit. The undeployed package is backed up in the optional archive area for possible future redeployment.

application/json.example: {"deployment_result":"CNC Function Packs DEPLOYED At time: 2023-06-14_09-52-39","status":"Following archives were moved to optional_packages: [ietf-te-fp-package-7.0.10-SNAPSHOT-bin.tar.gz]"}

post.description: Undeploys the specified custom file by removing it and running the 2 phase commit to undeploy it.

requestBody.description: JSON file with custom file names to undeploy

application/json.example: {"deployment_result":"CNC Function Packs DEPLOYED At time: 2023-06-14_09-16-25","status":"Following custom files were deleted: [testcustom.json]"}

post.description: Deploys or redeploys the cat function packages specified that are in packages directory by running the 2 phase commit.

patch.description: Uploads and deploys a cat function pack. The uploaded packages are copied to the packages area and the 2 phase commit is run to deploy it.

parameters.name: packages
parameters.description: Function Package to uploaded and deployed

application/json.example: {"deployment_result":"CNC Function Packs DEPLOYED At time: 2023-06-14_09-41-13","status":"Upload of packages succeeded"}

patch.description: Uploads and deploys a set of specified custom files. Each uploaded file is copied to the custom files area and the 2 phase commit is run.

parameters.name: customFiles
parameters.description: Custom files to be uploaded and deployed

application/json.example: {"deployment_result":"CNC Function Packs DEPLOYED At time: 2023-06-14_08-23-25","status":"Upload of customFiles succeeded"}

get.summary: Get list of uploaded custom files
get.description: Returns a list of static system provided and user provided custom files if such exist in the static folder, empty list otherwise

get.summary: Get content of a uploaded custom file
get.description: Returns the content of a static file, either system or user provided custom file

parameters.name: customfile
parameters.description: True for user custom file, false for system

get.description: Returns a list of package info. For each list various parameters are added including service path, resources, model version, etc.
